streams.name: accounts
streams.description: USAA retail accounts (checking, savings, credit cards, loans).

display.label: Your USAA accounts
display.detail: Account names, types, last-four, balances, and open/closed status.

streams.name: transactions
streams.description: USAA transactions. Primary key is a stable synthetic hash of (account_id, date, amount, original_description, ordinal-within-tuple) because USAA's CSV export does not expose transaction IDs. Amounts are in cents (integer, signed). Transactions come from two provenances: the 18-month CSV export (`source: 'csv_export'`) and parsed statement PDFs for older history (`source: 'pdf_statement_<YYYY-MM>'`). Because the id-hash input is identical across both paths, a CSV and a PDF record of the same logical transaction collapse to the same id on ingest.

display.label: Your USAA transactions
display.detail: Date, signed amount in cents, cleaned payee name, original statement description, USAA-assigned category, check number (parsed from original description), and running balance when available. Pending transactions included if visible.

streams.name: statements
streams.description: Statement index per account. Always includes title, delivery date, and account reference. When the connector successfully hydrates a statement PDF (by driving the 'Options → Download' menu on /my/documents), the row additionally carries `document_url` (file:// URI of the stored PDF), `pdf_path` (absolute on-disk path), and `pdf_sha256` (content hash). The PDFs themselves are stored under ~/.pdpp/usaa-statements/<account_slug>/<YYYY-MM>-<sha8>.pdf — per owner direction the archive is persistent, not scratch.

display.label: Your USAA statements
display.detail: Monthly statements across all accounts: document title, delivery date, and account reference. PDF download URL, local path, and content hash are populated when blob hydration has run; otherwise null.

account_id.description: FK to accounts.id. Resolved by matching the document row's account column (last-four first, then account name) back to the accounts stream. Null when neither match succeeds.

document_url.description: file:// URI for the stored PDF on disk. Populated only after blob hydration; null on index-only scrapes.

pdf_path.description: Absolute filesystem path of the downloaded PDF under ~/.pdpp/usaa-statements/. Null until hydrated.

pdf_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the downloaded PDF bytes. Populated only after blob hydration; null on index-only scrapes.

streams.name: inbox_messages
streams.description: Bank-generated messages in the USAA secure inbox.

display.label: Your USAA inbox
display.detail: Messages from USAA (statement alerts, new documents, service notices). Read/unread status and previews captured; full message bodies deferred.

streams.name: credit_card_billing
streams.description: Per-credit-card billing state: balance, credit limit, APR, rewards, minimum-payment status.

display.label: Your credit card billing details
display.detail: For each USAA-issued credit card: current balance, available credit, credit limit, APRs, cash-rewards balance, minimum-payment-met flag, card holder names.
